overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval village at dusk, crossing a lantern-lit cobblestone bridge over water, and approaching a waterfront encampment. The scene features warm golden hour lighting, traditional wooden architecture, and transitions from dirt village paths to a stone bridge and riverside camp.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village dirt path with wooden cottages and stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village path observing the surroundings and approaching the stone tower

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows rising above the village
traditional timber-framed cottage with thatched roof and lit windows
wooden plank house with sloped roof and chimney

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through a medieval village during golden hour. Traditional wooden cottages line both sides of the path while a prominent stone tower rises in the distance. The warm sunlight casts long shadows across the trail as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge approach with wooden fencing and flag markers

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to cobblestone as approaching the bridge entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward onto the cobblestone approach to the bridge

entered.detail: wooden post railing running alongside the path approach
red and gold flag banner mounted on a pole marking the bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the village dirt path onto a cobblestone bridge approach. Wooden fencing appears on the left while red banner flags mark the entrance to the bridge ahead. The stone tower and cottages fall behind as the character approaches the bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone bridge over water with wooden railings and lanterns

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to warm orange glow from lit wooden lanterns lining the bridge
water becomes visible on both sides of the bridge as character reaches the midpoint

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone bridge with water visible on both sides

entered.detail: arched cobblestone bridge surface with irregular stone paving
wooden posts with warm glowing lanterns mounted on top
calm river water reflecting the dusk sky and lantern light

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a cobblestone bridge illuminated by warm wooden lanterns. Water becomes visible on both sides of the bridge, reflecting the golden hour light. The enclosed bridge structure creates a corridor effect with the lanterns providing the primary light source as dusk deepens.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront encampment with canvas tents and campfires

events.description: exits cobblestone bridge onto dirt path approaching riverside camp with tents

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront camp, moving toward the tents and firelight

notable_agents.action: camp dweller standing near the firelight in the distance

entered.detail: large canvas tents with wooden frames set up in the encampment
burning campfire with visible flames and smoke rising

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bridge onto a dirt path leading into a waterfront encampment. Canvas tents and campfires become visible, with a figure standing near the firelight on the right. The water now appears on the right side of the path as the character approaches the camp area with wooden docks visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village that transitions from a sun-drenched residential path into a lantern-lit waterfront encampment. It begins along a dirt trail lined with wooden cottages and a distant stone tower, moving steadily forward as the warm golden hour sunlight casts long shadows. As the character leaves the village center, the terrain shifts from dirt to a cobblestone bridge approach marked by wooden fencing and red banner flags. The scene then narrows into a corridor of light as the camera crosses the bridge, where wooden lanterns illuminate the path and reflect off the water below. Finally, the camera exits the bridge onto a riverside path, moving past canvas tents and glowing campfires toward wooden docks as the light of dusk deepens.
